title: eurycles australis
intro: Eurycles australis, also known as the Australian box or native hawthorn, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Tasmania. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eurycles australis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Eurycles australis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
